display_text: Swift Blink, Cost: 6800: Teleport to a target point up to 1200 units away. Cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking hero or Roshan damage. After teleporting, grants 40% phased movement speed and +35 Agility for 6 seconds. High-tier mobility upgrade for extreme positioning and chase potential. Stats: CD: 15s, Range: 1200, Damage Disable: 3s, Agility Buff: +35, Phased MS: 40%, Duration: 6s.

display_text: Swift Blink, Cost: 6800: Provides +25 Agility passively. The primary upgrade from Blink Dagger or Arcane Blink, trading raw stats for superior chase and initiation power with the speed and agility buff on use. Stats: Agility: +25.

display_text: Swift Blink, Cost: 6800: Premium team fight and pickoff item for Agility carries and initiators. The post-blink speed and Agility boost lets heroes stick to targets or reposition aggressively during fights. The damage cooldown window requires precise engagement timing. Stats: Agility Active: +35, Duration: 6s.

display_text: Swift Blink, Cost: 6800: Essential for Agility heroes who rely on mobility and positioning for damage output (e.g., Phantom Assassin, Templar Assassin). The post-blink Agility spike significantly increases right-click damage for the duration. Stats: Agility Buff: +35.
